description: Schema for gateway-export parity vectors. Eight envelope-accepted deterministic JSON observation payloads covering all eight event_kind values: seven settlement/recovery state observations (payment-submitted, settlement-unresolved, settlement-polling, settlement-confirmed, settlement-confirmed-late, settlement-failed, settlement-failed-orphaned) plus one trigger observation (facilitator-timeout). PEAC does not introduce a new settlement state; the trigger observation records the gateway boundary signal that may precede unresolved recovery. Per the parity-corpus convention, all vectors assert envelope-level canonical agreement and set expected.accepted=true; semantic-rejection cases (invalid_payload for non-object top-level shapes, 19 forbidden top-level payment-data keys via inline_payment_data_blocked, value_minor rejected as unknown_field via the strict variant schema under the single-canonical-money-field invariant, opaque-ref grammar violations, negative amount_minor rejected via the Gateway Export non-negative profile constraint on the shared AmountMinorStringSchema grammar, custom timeout missing-timing-fields, bounded-numeric overflow, valid_before_unix_seconds safe-integer overflow, UTF-8 byte-limit overflow on asset / network / final_state / last_known_state, invalid event_kind, type URI / event_kind mismatch, and the timeout_profile / polling_strategy closed enums) live in the schema validator tests at packages/schema/__tests__/extensions/gateway-export.test.ts.
